title: Mason's Armory
description:
-[Greater than light, Laughter from pain]-
-[Dark days emerge, you shall be purged]-
body:
A mod that adds new and (not necesarily) neverbefore-seen mechanics and equipment to the game, themed around souls, life, death and the in between. Adding new items that you can make, to craft new gear and artifacts.

**Other dependencies:**
- Illuminations
- Mason Decor
- Jei/Emi/Not Enough Items (Recommended to see crafting recipes)

Side Note: This mod in particular works as an ''addon'' for Arathain's ''Mason Decor'', and other features from Diansu's ''Invictus Arsenal''.

## FEATURES
- **Building Blocks**
> - Netherite Blast Door (A vault door to store all your valuables)
> - Netherite Plated Bricks (And variants)
> - Netherite Plated Tiles (And variants)
> - Netherite Plated Fragments (And variants)
> - -(All of them serve to build your vault, being almost indestructible)
- **Decorative Blocks**
> - Skull Stand (Can place Normal and Wither Skull, makes funny noise when right clicked)
> - Creepy Radio (Right click to play some music, shift right-click to stop it (working on improvements))
> - Visa Plush (Right click to make a cool pose and pizza tower taunt sound)
> - Wraithwinder (Don't build with this brand new explosive, I recommend tearing down kingdoms with it, right click with flint and steel to activate or just right click when in [NEO] form)
- **Music Discs**
> - They currently can't be droppend nor obtained, but it is in my plans to do so.
- **The Contract**
> - Currently an artifact bound to the Creative Inventory, but planned to be released as a crafteable item for solo survival players.
> - It grants the player a Netherite Blast Door*, a Blast Door Key*, Radiated Essence* and an Eternal Seal*.
> - The Main Mechanic: You sign this paper to receive some powerful artifacts and greater power to craft an arsenal of unstoppable weapons and machinery, by limiting your life to 3 lives before unleashing -[IGNIS, THE USURPER]- and you being stuck in spectator until someone frees you.
- **MISC Items**
> - Blast Door Key (Allows the player to open the Netherite Blast Door* by right clicking the middle-bottom block)
> - Wandering Soul (Used to craft various artifacts and equipment, right click on the floor to spawn a soul that follow you, brought to you by Illuminations)
> - Soul-clothed Ingot (A Clothed Ingot-inspired item, from RAT'S MISCHIEF to make Soul Strafe Armor*)
> - Titan's Skull (Place down to spawn a Titan from The Owl House™ (This was a fan request))
> - Eternal Seal (Used to craft a Rift Gate*)
> - Bottle Of Enchanted Liquid Netherite (Used to craft Flask Of Biometal*)
> - Flask Of Biometal (Used to craft Biometal Catalyst*)
> - Biometal Catalyst (Used to craft [NEO] Fusion Assembly*)
> - Radiated Essence (Used to craft [NEO] Fusion Assembly*)
> - Soul Consumption Effigy (Dropped by The Caretaker*, Grants strength when killing an oponent (Helpful in the final battle against -[IGNIS, THE USURPER]-)) 
> - [NEO] Fusion Assembly (With the right combination of items, can conver itself on the [NEO] Fusion Reactor)
> - Ghostly Respawn Anchor (An item that needs to be charged with Diamonds* and Wandering Souls* to be used to free the player that signed the contract and wiped off the server)
> - Statue Armor (Put on armor stands to become statues)
- **Foodstuff**
> - Warden Cookie (Made to eat)
> - Mint (Not for consumption, but can be used to craft Mint Stuff*)
> - Mint Stuff (A cool drink)
> - Fizzy Drink (Can give you the Fizzyness* effect)
> - Sculked Apple (Can give you a huge temporary power boost)
> - Netherite Apple (Makes you very resistant but slow for a short period of time)
> - Bottle O' Souls (Fast Regenerations)
- **Arsenal**
> - Light Netherite Armor (A cheap alternative to Netherite Armor*, used to craft Soul Strafe Armor*)
> - Netherite Nail (A cheap alternative to Netherite Sword*, used to craft Guard's Nail*)
> - Guard's Nail (Used to craft Soul Sickle*)
> - Soul Sickle (Used to craft Soul Strafe Harpoon*, compatible with Grandmastery* enchantment)
> - Soul Strafe Harpoon (Deals a TON of damage and is compatible with the Whirlwind* enchantment)
> - Soul Strafe Armor (A Netherite-alternative that offers more mobility and it is compatible with the Curse Of The Wisps* enchantment)
> - Rift Gate (Spawns a -RADIANCE- that obliterates anyone who you decide to kill)
> - Soul-Shattering Horn (Makes a loud noise that gives the enemies blindness)
> - Marauder (A parody of the Mould Of Souls* from Mason Decor, that spawns a Marauder*)
> - Pyromancer (Another parody of the Mould Of Souls* from Mason Decor, that spawns a Pyromancer*)
> - Heavy Netherite Exoskeleton (You can use it as armor, or shove it in the [NEO] Fusion Assembly*)
> - [NEO] Fusion Reactor (Prepare yourself, because this one is a doozy. The first time you activate it, it will give you the Overclocking* effect. The second time, (while having the Overclocking* effect) it will do a small cinematic shot and trigger the [NEO] Protocol, turning the day to night, putting a bossbar for you, giving you a second row of hearts, making you 30% bigger, doubling you reach and increasing your jump height by 30%. Then it will save your current inventory and load in a new one with: Grave Bane*, The Starfall*, 64 Bottles O' Souls*, 5 Netherite Apples*, Soul-Shattering Horn*, A full sef of [NEO] Soulcleave Exoskeleton enchanted with Curse Of The Wisps* and Curse of Binding, Moon Phaser*, 64 Diamond, 3 Pyromancers*, 3 Marauders*, 3 Mould Of Souls*, Depleted [NEO] Fusion Reactor [When revived, activates Primed [NEO] superform])
> - [NEO] Soulcleave Forge (Every time you get hit, the source of the damage will get burned with a 60% chance/Night Vision)
> - [NEO] Soulcleave Aegis (With 16 diamonds you can gain a second chance if you die/Flight)
> - [NEO] Soulcleave Chausses (Every time you hit someone, you can get a Bottle O' Souls* or a Netherite Apple* (low chance and random))
> - [NEO] Soulcleave Boots (Shift+Right-click on ground to make a shockwave)
> - Grave Bane (When you kill someone with it, you regenerate/Right click then release to dash, if looking to the ground with a pitch of 40 to 90 degrees, colliding with the floor will result in a cool explosion with shockwave, when gliding or attacking can activate Soul Strain* effect on enemies)
> - The Starfall (Right click to use fire blast, right click in off hand to use flamethrower, right click while shifting to use super laser, left click on enemies to push them, left click on enemies while shifting to use seismic punch)
> - Moon Phaser (Compatible with Grandmastery* enchantment, left click on enemies to reel them in, right click to use fast attack, right click while shifting to use snowgrave)
> - Depleted [NEO] Fusion Reactor (Right click it to restore your old inventory and status)
> - Radiant Robes (Gives god-like status while wearing/can parry attacks)
> - The Incinerator (Deals a TON of damage and if right clicked can summon a beam like the one -[IGNIS, THE USURPER]- uses)
- **Entities**
> - Caretaker (Spawns when a player with contract dies, drops the Soul Consumption Effigy*)
> - Pyromancer (Spawns deactivated, right click to activate, right click with item to activate asasin mode, right click empty handed to deactivate asasin mode. Asasin mode kills anything alive, normal mode kills anything that attacks you or you attack)
> - Marauder (Same thing with Pyromancer)
> - Friendly Spirit (Spawns in when you shift and left click with a soul lantern, shift and right click to get your soul lantern back)
> - Titan (Blasts your enemies, right click with bone in main hand to make 'em sit, right click with bone in off hand to make 'em follow you)
> - Crystal Walker (A zombie with high resistance and speed)
> - Spark (A blaze variant that shoots the same projectiles as the Pyromancer)
> - -THE RADIANCE- (A beast you command to attack for a limited time)
> - Grim (Appears when you get revied as [NEO], whips around and spins, shoots lasers)
> - -[IGNIS, THE USURPER]- (The boss of an armageddon that you could use all the stuff on the mod (including the Soul Consumption Effigy) and the rest of the server to stop this beast, when defeated, it drops the Radiant Robes and The Incinerator)
- **Enchantments**
> - Whirlwind (Compatible with Soul Strafe Harpoon, right click on enemies to push them)
> - Curse Of The Wisps (Compatible with the Soul Strafe Armor and [NEO] Soulcleave Armor, transforms into a flying soul upon taking a lot of damage or drying)
> - Grandmastery (Compatible with the Soul Sickles and Moon Phaser, Fast attacks)
- **Effects**
> - Overclocking (Burns entities near you)
> - Soul Strain (Freezes entities in place)
> - Curse Of The Wisps (Transforms you into a flying soul)
